source: Generated by scripts/release/generate-secrets-evidence.mjs from local no-secret proof booleans; raw tokens, URLs, DSNs, webhooks, private keys, and secret values are rejected before writing

DATABASE_URL.note: Presence for DATABASE_URL must be verified in an approved secret store without committing the value.

STAGING_DATABASE_URL.note: Presence for STAGING_DATABASE_URL must be verified in an approved secret store without committing the value.

NEON_API_KEY.note: NEON_API_KEY management access is verified by no-secret Neon connector project, branch, and compute proof without storing a Neon token or database URL.

NEON_PROJECT_ID.note: NEON_PROJECT_ID presence is verified from read-only Neon project evidence without storing a Neon API key or database URL.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.note: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN management access is verified by successful no-secret Cloudflare API write proof without storing the token value.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.note: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID presence is verified from read-only Cloudflare connector account evidence without storing an API token.

CF_ADMIN_WORKER_NAME.note: CF_ADMIN_WORKER_NAME matches the verified Salary Hijacking Admin Worker target without storing secret values.

EXPO_TOKEN.note: Presence for EXPO_TOKEN must be verified in an approved secret store without committing the value.

EAS_PROJECT_ID.note: Presence for EAS_PROJECT_ID must be verified in an approved secret store without committing the value.

GITHUB_TOKEN.note: GITHUB_TOKEN is verified as the automatic GitHub Actions runtime token for the matched Salary Hijacking repository without storing the token value.

GITHUB_REPOSITORY.note: GITHUB_REPOSITORY matches the verified Salary Hijacking GitHub release target without storing a token.

SENTRY_DSN.note: SENTRY_DSN presence is verified by Cloudflare Worker secret binding name observation for the Salary Hijacking API, notifications, scheduler, and admin Workers without storing the DSN value.

SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL.note: SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL presence is verified by Cloudflare Worker secret binding name observation for the Salary Hijacking API Worker without storing the webhook URL value.
